case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CITY OF COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO REPRESENTED BY RYON HAYWARD, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC. REPRESENTED BY FINBAR BRODY, PRESIDENT IS PRESENT. COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S ORAL REQUEST TO AMEND CLAIM AMOUNT TO $9,697.99 IN EXCESS OF $2,500.00. AS A PUBLIC ENTITY, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS ALLOWED TO SEEK DAMAGES IN EXCESS OF $2,500.00. DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR, PLAINTIFF WAS UNABLE TO AMEND HIS CLAIM REFLECTING THE NEW AMOUNT AND WAS UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF AMENDED CLAIM FOR DAMAGES OF $9,697.99. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-28-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST IS DUE TO A MEDICAL ISSUE. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED APR-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RYON HAYWARD, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FINBAR BRODY, PRESIDENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRECISION ENGINEERING, INC. CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE DUE TO INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE/LIABLE FOR THE ALLEGED DAMAGE TO WATER LINES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
